typography.styling_rules: Use Playfair Display for main section headings with strategic use of italics (e.g., 'Selected *Projects*'). Use JetBrains Mono for data points, tags, and technical metrics.

visual_enhancers.textures: Apply a subtle CSS/SVG grain/noise overlay globally across the background with opacity-5 to remove digital flatness.

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-accent-primary text-white hover:bg-accent-hover rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,77,0,0.4)] hover:-translate-y-1 active:translate-y-0
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-primary hover:border-white/30 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/5
buttons.icon: h-12 w-12 rounded-full border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center hover:border-accent-primary hover:text-accent-primary transition-all duration-300

cards.base: bg-surface border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 transition-all duration-500 hover:border-white/15 relative overflow-hidden group
cards.hover_effect: Add an absolute, transparent-to-glow radial gradient that follows the mouse (via Framer Motion or pure CSS) to create a premium Apple-like card reveal.

tags.base: px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-xs font-mono text-secondary hover:text-primary transition-colors

hero_image.treatment: Editorial framed portrait. 3:4 aspect ratio. Rendered in monochrome/grayscale by default using CSS filters. On hover, smoothly transition to full color with a slight scale-up effect. Wrapper should have rounded-2xl, border-white/10, and a subtle inner shadow. Overlay a very faint grain texture.

layouts.hero: Asymmetric split layout. Left (60%): Eyebrow, Massive heading (Playfair Display, staggered text animation), descriptive body text, two CTA buttons. Right (40%): The editorial profile portrait placed with a slight parallax offset.
layouts.about: Bento grid style. Top row spanning full width for narrative. Bottom row split into 4 equal cards (col-span-1) for statistics (8.27 CGPA, 2 Internships, 10+ Projects, 1000+ Event Participants) featuring huge Mono numbers.
layouts.skills: Categorized masonry or dense flex-wrap grid. Group by: Development (Python, Java, JS, HTML, CSS, React, Tailwind, Bootstrap, AWS, Git), Data/ML (SQL, Pandas, NumPy, Power BI, Matplotlib, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, NLP), Design (Figma, UI Design, UX Research, Wireframing). Use small pill-shaped tags with Lucide icons.
layouts.experience: Vertical timeline. Left side features a 1px vertical line with absolute positioned glowing dot indicators. Right side holds the content blocks (Infinite Computer Solutions, To The New). Dates in JetBrains Mono.
layouts.projects: Asymmetric 3-column CSS grid. Large featured projects span 2 columns, standard projects span 1 column. Clicking a project card triggers a Shadcn Dialog (Modal) featuring an expanded view with the project image, extensive details, and tech stack tags.
layouts.contact: Two column layout. Left: Large typography 'Let's Build Something' and direct contact info/socials. Right: Shadcn Form components (Input, Textarea, Button) encased in a glassmorphism card. Ensure frontend validation.

motion.scroll_reveal: WhileInView fade-up with a viewport margin of '-100px' to trigger just as items enter.
motion.hover_states: Scale elements slightly (scale: 1.02) and lift (y: -4) with a spring transition (stiffness: 400, damping: 25).
motion.parallax: Use Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform to apply subtle vertical shifts to images and background elements based on scroll position.

accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='nav-about-link', data-testid='project-modal-close').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure the molten orange accent passes contrast checks against the dark charcoal background. If text is placed on the accent color, use inverse (black) text.
accessibility.motion: Respect 'prefers-reduced-motion' for all Framer Motion animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React (.js, not .tsx) app with Tailwind CSS.
Configure Tailwind config with the custom colors, fonts (Playfair Display, Manrope, JetBrains Mono), and visual specs provided.
Install and integrate framer-motion, lucide-react, @studio-freight/react-lenis (for smooth scrolling).
Install shadcn/ui primitives specifically for Dialog (Projects modal), Input/Textarea/Button (Contact form).
Strictly avoid Space Grotesk and purple/violet gradients.
Implement the custom 'molten orange' accent cleanly, prioritizing typography and layout structure over excessive decoration.
Apply data-testid to every button, link, form field, and interactive card.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Make creative, distinctive frontends.
Do NOT use universal transition 'transition: all'. Explicitly state transition properties.
Do NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }). Keep natural left-aligned reading flow.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical to maintain the premium Apple/Framer vibe.
Ensure glassmorphism headers have a defined background (e.g. bg-[#0a0a0a]/70), never completely transparent.
Use Lucide-React for all icons unless explicitly specified otherwise. No emoji icons.
Never use generic placeholder image URLs. Use the provided face.img and resume.pdf assets where necessary.
